emails.subject: Chase custody account
emails.body: Chase custody account Paul: Laurel Adams told me that you would provide me with a name and phone number of someone at Chase for purposes of negotiating the global custody account. Do you have any information? Thanks. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: Chase custody account
emails.body: RE: Chase custody account Sure. Chris Hill (212) 946-8887 To: Garcia, Paul

emails.subject: RE: Chase custody account
emails.body: RE: Chase custody account I received a call from Bank of New York's Ray Palmer. He indicated that he would like to set up a conference call. They are a bit more expensive and we initially had some legal concerns with their documentation. Lets discuss. To: Garcia, Paul

emails.subject: RE: Chase custody account
emails.body: Paul: Why don't you and I speak about the Enron concerns first. I've reviewed the agreement and have a couple of questions about how we intend to use the account. I'm available this morning before 10 am and after 3 pm this afternoon. And I'm free all day tomorrow. Thanks. Sara p.s. Do we need to bring in someone from Gary's group (e.g., Sheila Glover)? Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Paul Garcia/ENRON@enronXgate 02/27/2001 07:48 AM
